feed.subtitle: Latest gigs and events in Oslo, Norway
feed.title: Oslo Gig Guide

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-06-04 20:00
Tags: Rock, Acoustic, Rocknroll


Elegantly Wasted & Perfectly Out Of Tune

  • The reunion of the year -

19 years after Glamour Punks legends Trashcan Darlings disbanded, Chris Damien Doll and Strange? Gentle have once again decided to come together... over you.

StrangeDolls will perform some of their most beautiful songs acoustically at Brew Gata on June 4th, just the two of them, like at all those backstage parties in the past. The songs are just as full of raw emotions today as they ever were and... who knows if it will take another 19 years for this chance to come again...

This is the StrangeDolls:

Born from the glitter of the gutters in the pouring rain. Playing music for lovers and haters out there in the night. Songs of hearts and roses, stories of dreams and desires, distorted pasts and futures that never came, tales of kings & queens, untuned guitars and desolate streets. The StrangeDolls were there, lived there, almost died there, but survived and have returned to tell their story.

You remember them, you say? Like a glimpse of a broken dream from a time when the future used to look better? A distorted remembrance of one of those late, drunken, nights in a time that is no more, but always was, and always will be… Cause it’s true, my love. It’s true. There was a time...

The StrangeDolls coloured those graveyards of lost hope in colours without names. You could see them walking down the alleys, dressed to kill. They had so much style... In a way you feel you knew them, you loved them, you lost them.

There was a time... that time is now

The StrangeDolls are Strange? Gentle & Chris Damien Doll


Tickets: tikkio.com
entry.summary: Strange Dolls // Acoustic Live at Brewgata on 2026-06-04 20:00
entry.title: Strange Dolls // Acoustic Live (2026-06-04)

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-06-05 19:00
Tags: Indierock, Postpunk


Tjommiiiii dåe! Ventetiden over og Dimling kommer ut av en dvale som var på ubestemt tid! Denne gangen med albumet «ingenting e noe» En reise som starter i et smell med en brå vending inn i noe mykt og trygt før stien sakte beveger seg inn i en mørk skog der tjomsebass er nødt å bli hard i stilen igjen for å overleve! Ka ska du si meg om det baias!

Dimling gleder seg som bare faen til å rive ned veggene og sjangalabangale ut gjennom taket! Så hold deg i titsa eller boigeloigen for dette blir sexyyyyy!

Gratis inngang så du har råd til enda fler pils tjomsebass❤️

Support: Known Thieves

Known Thieves - moody indie-rock med tydelig post-punk-energi, tighte gitarer, pulserende basslinjer og observerende sangtekster på grensen til det filmatiske.


Tickets:
entry.summary: Dimling +Supp: Known Thieves at Brewgata on 2026-06-05 19:00
entry.title: Dimling +Supp: Known Thieves (2026-06-05)

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-06-06 16:00
Tags: Punk, Musikkfestoslo, Hardcore


Here we go again!

Punk with some traces of hardcore and all around awesomeness for Musikkfest 2026 🙌

On stage: 16:30 Engraved 17:30 Islandsgate 18:30 Sunny Bleach 19:30 Exploding Head Syndrome 20:30 Dårlig Hjort


Tickets:
entry.summary: (A Very Punk) Musikkfest Vol.2 at Brewgata on 2026-06-06 16:00
entry.title: (A Very Punk) Musikkfest Vol.2 (2026-06-06)

entry.content:
Venue: John Dee
Start: 2026-10-03 19:00
Tags: indiefolk, chamberpop, artrock


Black Sea Dahu kommer til John Dee lørdag 3. oktober!

Anført av den sveitsiske singer-songwriteren Janine Cathrein har bandet skapt sitt helt eget univers. Med en sømløs blanding av indiefolk, kammerpop og kunstrock trosser de sjangergrenser og treffer rett i hjertet. De er aktuelle med sitt nye album Everything!

--

Bill. kr. 300,- + bill.avg.

18 års aldersgrense med legitimasjonsplikt. Ingen vergeordning. Gyldig legitimasjon er fysisk nasjonalt ID-kort, pass, fysisk førerkort eller bankkort med bilde. Digital legitimasjon (digitalt førerkort eller Bank-ID) eller bilde av legitimasjon er ikke gyldig legitimasjon.

Arrangementer har ståplasser.

Dørene åpner kl. 19.00. Arrangementet starter ca. 1 time etter dørene åpner. NB! Det anbefales å komme i god tid før arrangementet starter da det kan bli kø.


Tickets: www.ticketmaster.no
entry.summary: Black Sea Dahu at John Dee on 2026-10-03 19:00
entry.title: Black Sea Dahu (2026-10-03)
